chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI. Cr. Bail Appl No.1909 of 2024 (Nafees ahmed vs. The State) 23.10.2024 Mr. Muhammad Taseer Khan, advocate for applicant a/w applicant Barrister Main Haad A.M. Special Prosecutor, ANF O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO J: Applicant was arrested while driving a container in Port Qasim (PQ) on 27.008.2011 from which 2498 kgs of charas was recovered. In the trial, he was granted bail but before the trial could be completed he jumped off the bail on 18.11.2021 and was declared as absconder. Instead of surrendering before the trial Court, he has filed this application for pre-arrest bail directly before this Court. 2. Learned defence counsel submits that applicant could not appear before the trial Court as he had received burns on his left arm and was not well. 3. His arguments have been opposed by learned Special Prosecutor, ANF. 4. It appears that applicant was granted bail but he misused the same concession by jumping it off. He remained fugitive from law for almost 03 years without intimating the Court and only on 23.08.2024, he filed this bail application before this Court directly instead of surrendering before the trial Court. In the circumstances, no case of extending extra-ordinary concession of pre-arrest bail has been made out. Accordingly, this application is dismissed. The ad-interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant on 23.08.2024 is hereby recalled. 5. Needless to mention that the observations made herein above are tentative in nature and would not prejudice case of either party at trial. The bail application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Rafiq/P.A.
